code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)

mut i = 0
mut a = 0
mut b = 0
mut count = 0
mut current = 0
mut in_num = false

while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(c)
    if c >= 48 and c <= 57
      current = current * 10 + (c - 48)
      in_num = true
    else
      if in_num
        if count == 0
          a = current
        else
          b = current
        end
        count = count + 1
        current = 0
        in_num = false
      end
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if in_num
  if count == 0
    a = current
  else
    b = current
  end
end

mut x = a
mut y = b
while y != 0
  let t = y
  y = x % y
  x = t
end

println("gcd=#{x}")
